mapper.select: SELECT CAST(w.tag_id AS text) AS tag_id, t.code AS tag_code, t.display_name AS display_name, t.group_code AS group_code, gt.display_name AS group_display_name, w.preference_score AS preference_score, w.like_count AS like_count, w.super_like_count AS super_like_count, w.nope_count AS nope_count FROM preference.user_preference_tag_weights w JOIN preference.preference_tags t ON t.id = w.tag_id LEFT JOIN preference.preference_tags gt ON gt.code = t.group_code AND gt.tag_type = 'GROUP' WHERE w.user_id = CAST(#{userId} AS uuid) AND t.tag_type = 'TAG' AND t.is_active = true ORDER BY w.preference_score DESC, t.sort_order ASC
SELECT EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM preference.user_preference_tag_weights WHERE user_id = CAST(#{userId} AS uuid) AND (like_count > 0 OR super_like_count > 0 OR nope_count > 0) )
